回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 西方文化研究 (Western Culture Studies)	開課班級 : 應英一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 洪淑敏	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to introduce American culture and literature to students. Students are going to learn historical development and cultural background in the USA. 


2.教學綱要
Students will learn about various aspects of American cultures; e.g. American Literature, American Religious Heritage, The world of American Business, How American Spend their Leisure Time, The American Education,The Amercian Family, American Values, Ethnic and Racial Diversity 


3.教科書

出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Datesman, Crandall, Kearny　出版社 : Longman　版本 :

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1.Mid-term exam 30% 2. Final exam 30% 3. Reports, assignments, quiz, class participation and attendance 40%  
Your grade will be deducted for being absent, using cell phone and being late.
